'''Joss Leskwin''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], who controlled an area of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] which contained the planet [[Hjaff]]. He had difficulty in subduing the native [[Tarc]] and hoped to gather enough forces to eventually overwhelm the alien natives.<ref name="SWAJ14" />
